metadata.description: DevFlow autonomous development system and AOSentry AI gateway tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: devflow
plugins.description: Meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system. 34 skills, 12 agents, wave-based parallelization, atomic commits, and persistent state across context resets.

plugins.name: aosentry-mcp
plugins.description: AOSentry AI gateway MCP servers. 45 tools: image generation, vision analysis, TTS, transcription, spend analytics, API key management, guardrails, model routing, user/team/org management, budgets, and health monitoring.
